occurrence_sentence: Quantum Mads, like Multiverse Computing, is another QC startup from Spain. Founded in May of this year by co-founders Eriz Zárate and Alain Mateo Armas, Quantum Mads headquarters are in the beautiful Basque region of north-eastern Spain.
